meta.name: Press Mention Aggregator
meta.description: Monitor RSS feeds and news sources for brand mentions, competitor mentions, and industry news. Compile a weekly press digest with sentiment.

parameters.content:
## 48 — Press Mention Aggregator

**Required:**
- BRAND_NAME: your company/product name
- COMPETITOR_NAMES: comma-separated competitor names
- PRESS_RSS_URL_1 / _2: RSS feeds for tech/industry news
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Tuesday and Friday at 09:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Analyze press mentions and news snippets. Classify sentiment, relevance and significance. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 📰 Press Digest {{ $json.date }}: {{ $json.raw_count }} mentions | {{ $json.brand_score }} brand sentiment
